About Me
The Developer
Behind the Code
5+
Years of
Expertise

I'm a Full-Stack Java Developer with a deep specialization in enterprise banking technology. Over the past 5+ years, I've architected and delivered critical fintech infrastructure — most notably the Al Rajhi DigiCore Loan Origination System for Saudi Arabia's largest bank, serving 25M+ customers.

My expertise spans the full stack: Java Spring Boot microservices on the backend, React on the frontend, and deep integration work with Newgen BPM platforms, SOAP/REST APIs, and enterprise document management systems.

I thrive in complex, high-stakes environments where reliability and performance aren't optional — and I've earned 3 company awards for delivering under pressure.

Professional
Experience
Oct 2025 — Present
TAO Digital Solutions
Software Engineer · Hyderabad, India
  • Developing scalable microservices using Java and Spring Boot, integrating internal systems and third-party APIs through RESTful web services.

Jan 2023 — Oct 2025
Newgen Software
Senior Software Engineer · Bangalore, India
  • Promoted to Senior Engineer within 18 months for outstanding contributions to Al Rajhi Bank DigiCore LOS.
  • Led development of 10+ REST & SOAP API integrations connecting LOS with core banking systems and external financial services.
  • Identified and resolved 35+ SQL injection vulnerabilities via SonarQube, reducing security debt by 60% within 2 sprints.
  • Designed backend modules using Core Java, Collections Framework, Multithreading, Hibernate & SQL — supporting high-throughput transactions across 3 digital channels.
  • Reduced manual document handling time by ~35% through XML/JSON data transformation pipelines and template generation.
  • Provided techno-functional ownership of Newgen BPM (OmniFlow), OmniDocs ECM, CLOS, and RLOS implementations.
